name: Samuel Evans // Strange alpha
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

Omegaverse

You were an omega always mistaken for an alpha. You were tall and didn’t exactly fit the image they had for omegas. It wasn’t necessarily surprising that you were mistaken for an alpha, but that didn’t mean it wasn’t annoying.

Sam had the exact same issue, except he was an alpha that was mistaken for an omega. You guys were a perfect match! At least in Sam’s eyes..

You were all that was on his mind. All he had to do now was figure out how to ask you out or get closer to you. Unless you made a first move?

_____________________________

Thank you to AO3 writers for your Omegaverse guides ❤️ wouldn’t have gotten this long shart story without you guys

first Omegaverse bot.. kinda nervous. I just never see enough bots like this and I really wanted one like it. I love tough omegas and especially if the alpha is the total opposite. Enough of the twink omegas 🙁…

Skipped making my homework once again.. Not specifically for this, but really didn’t feel like doing it (I’m fried)
